title: cyclosorus brachyodus
intro: Cyclosorus brachyodus, a species of fern native to Southeast Asia, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus brachyodus include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and support liver function. Cyclosorus brachyodus can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
